coreValues.sectionDescription: These values set the standard for decisions on scope, budget, and schedule while protecting quality and accountability. Professional on the line. Thorough in the details.

values.supportingSlogan: Clear facts. No spin. No surprises.
values.description: Transparent pricing, direct communication, and real-time updates on scope, budget, and schedule. We flag risks early and say when a project is not the right fit.

values.valueSlogan: Do right when no one is watching.
values.description: We follow specified materials and methods, honor commitments, and stand behind the work with clear warranties. No shortcuts.

values.supportingSlogan: Standards high on every site, every day.
values.description: We show up prepared, communicate clearly, run organized sites, and treat people and property with respect.

values.supportingSlogan: Measure twice, document always, close out clean.
values.description: We plan in detail, document each phase, run quality checkpoints, and close with complete punch and turnover records.

companyStats.subtitle: Performance Snapshot
companyStats.title: Numbers You Can Verify
companyStats.description: Quick snapshot of safety performance, team depth, delivery volume, and licensing coverage across Washington, Oregon, and Idaho. No gaps. No guesswork. Just accountable follow-through.

services.sectionDescription: See how we deliver AG and winery projects, commercial tenant improvements, and municipal builds with clear ownership, Procore visibility, and closeout-ready controls. MH Construction prides itself on being the answer before the problem through Professional Pre-Construction and Handoff Procedures. Every complex project presents a minefield of operational risks—MHC neutralizes the variables and secures your delivery. Every build introduces unique structural and regulatory challenges. MHC provides the precise project management required to navigate them on time and within scope. Squared away from start to finish.

items.title: AG and Winery Communities
items.subtitle: Agricultural and Winery Project Delivery
items.description: Project delivery for AG and winery communities with Procore visibility, safety-first field controls, and handoff-ready closeout, including pond liner systems for wastewater and sludge runoff.
features: Winery pond liner installation for wastewater and sludge runoff containment
AG facility coordination with stainless-steel implications
Proven delivery context from projects like Darigold Plant in Pasco

features: Public facility and civic renovation scopes

whyPartner.sectionTitle: Who Owns What at Every Stage
whyPartner.sectionDescription: Review our ownership model, escalation path, and approval controls so decisions stay clear from kickoff through post-closeout support. From Handshake to Handoff, we got your 'six.'
whyPartner.philosophy: Your word is your bond — so is ours. Period.

values.title: .64 EMR - Industry-Leading Safety
values.subtitle: Every Team Member Returns Home Safe
values.description: Multiple AGC-WA Top EMR Awards with .64 EMR—40% better than industry average. 3+ years without time-loss injury and OSHA VPP Star designation. No compromises on safety, period.

values.title: 150+ Years of Combined Experience
values.subtitle: Proven Construction Expertise
values.description: Our team brings 150+ years of combined construction expertise. Veterans and civilians working together, leveraging proven methods refined through generations. Deep experience you can trust.

values.title: Complete Transparency
values.subtitle: Zero Surprises
values.description: Open-book pricing with visibility into cost, timeline, and decisions. No hidden costs, and honest assessments at every phase.

values.title: Long-Term Partnerships
values.subtitle: Relationships That Outlast Projects
values.description: 70% of our business comes from referrals and repeat partners. We earn trust through consistent delivery and stay engaged after closeout.

values.title: 650+ Successful Projects
values.subtitle: Proven Track Record
values.description: 650+ completed projects show reliable execution. Veteran leadership brings discipline, calm planning under pressure, and consistent follow-through.

values.title: 3-State Licensing
values.subtitle: Licensed Across the Pacific Northwest
values.description: Fully licensed across Washington, Oregon, and Idaho with comprehensive insurance and bonding. Credentials are maintained through continuous compliance.
highlights: Licensed in WA, OR, and ID

process.subtitle: Execution Roadmap
process.title: Six-Stage Operating Model
process.descriptionPart3: . Ownership, escalation, and approvals stay visible with
process.descriptionPart5: . Built on Quality, Backed by Trust.

steps.title: Intake and Qualification
steps.desc: Define fit, goals, and constraints upfront so the right delivery path is clear for AG, Winery, and Municipal work.

steps.title: Preconstruction Planning
steps.desc: Estimators lead budget intelligence, scope planning, and risk controls before field mobilization. "Creating Value, from Proven Results." explains our preconstruction methods.

steps.title: Execution Control
steps.desc: Superintendents lead field execution while PMs manage delivery controls. Costs above $5,000 require COO approval; above $25,000 add CFO approval.

steps.title: Quality and Safety Validation
steps.desc: Quality checkpoints and safety enforcement are continuous. Superintendents hold stop-work authority with defined escalation through PM, Safety Officer, COO, and Owner.

steps.title: Handoff and Closeout
steps.desc: Verify closeout packages, punch-list completion, and turnover readiness before handoff. Owner and President provides final closeout sign-off.

steps.title: Post-Closeout Support
steps.desc: The original PM owns warranty handling with COO authorization. Marketing and Estimation teams maintain follow-up after turnover.
